'''鈭歫-r-r-k''' ('''kajarekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xeet|xeet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xeet|xeet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-r-r-k
|-
! Lemma
| kajarekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijarekoko|thijarekoko]] || [[word:jijarekoko|jijarekoko]] || [[word:shijarekoko|shijarekoko]] || [[word:kijarekoko|kijarekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarekoko|thojarekoko]] || [[word:jojarekoko|jojarekoko]] || [[word:shojarekoko|shojarekoko]] || [[word:kojarekoko|kojarekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jarekoko|th忙jarekoko]] || [[word:j忙jarekoko|j忙jarekoko]] || [[word:sh忙jarekoko|sh忙jarekoko]] || [[word:k忙jarekoko|k忙jarekoko]]
|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
